_comment: Registry of agents approved to contribute catalog changes. ONLY public Ed25519 (SPKI PEM) keys belong here — never a private key. See docs/agent-gateway.md for how the gate uses this file and how to add an agent. Changes to this file must be human-reviewed (protected path).

agents.name: Autonomous Source Curator
agents.description: The curator/ pipeline that discovers, validates, classifies, and adds sources. Signs with a key whose private half is held only as the CURATOR_SIGNING_KEY CI secret (or an operator key file for sanctioned local runs).
